mapper.sql: id, appeal_code, record_id, record_code, class_stat_id, item_id, class_id, class_name, grade_id, category_id, category_name, item_name, COALESCE(original_deduct_score, original_score) as original_deduct_score, link_info, original_photo_urls, original_remark, appeal_type, appeal_reason, expected_score, evidence_urls, COALESCE(appealer_id, appellant_id) as appealer_id, COALESCE(appealer_name, appellant_name) as appealer_name, appellant_role, appeal_time, appeal_deadline, status, current_step, final_reviewer_id, final_reviewer_name, final_review_time, final_review_opinion, adjusted_score, score_change, publicity_start_time, publicity_end_time, publicity_days, effective_time, approval_flow_snapshot, created_at, updated_at

a.id, a.appeal_code, a.record_id, a.record_code, a.class_stat_id, a.item_id, a.class_id, a.class_name, a.grade_id, a.category_id, a.category_name, a.item_name, COALESCE(a.original_deduct_score, a.original_score) as original_deduct_score, a.link_info, a.original_photo_urls, a.original_remark, a.appeal_type, a.appeal_reason, a.expected_score, a.evidence_urls, COALESCE(a.appealer_id, a.appellant_id) as appealer_id, COALESCE(a.appealer_name, a.appellant_name, u.real_name) as appealer_name, a.appellant_role, a.appeal_time, a.appeal_deadline, a.status, a.current_step, a.final_reviewer_id, a.final_reviewer_name, a.final_review_time, a.final_review_opinion, a.adjusted_score, a.score_change, a.publicity_start_time, a.publicity_end_time, a.publicity_days, a.effective_time, a.approval_flow_snapshot, a.created_at, a.updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM check_item_appeals a LEFT JOIN users u ON COALESCE(a.appealer_id, a.appellant_id) = u.id
ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM check_item_appeals a LEFT JOIN users u ON COALESCE(a.appealer_id, a.appellant_id) = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id}

SELECT
FROM check_item_appeals a LEFT JOIN users u ON COALESCE(a.appealer_id, a.appellant_id) = u.id WHERE a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.created_at ASC

SELECT
FROM check_item_appeals a LEFT JOIN users u ON COALESCE(a.appealer_id, a.appellant_id) = u.id WHERE a.status = 6 ORDER BY a.publicity_end_time ASC

SELECT
FROM check_item_appeals WHERE status = 6 AND publicity_end_time <= #{currentTime}

SELECT
FROM check_item_appeals a WHERE a.status = 1 AND TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, a.appeal_time, NOW()) > #{timeoutHours}

SELECT
FROM check_item_appeals a LEFT JOIN users u ON COALESCE(a.appealer_id, a.appellant_id) = u.id WHERE a.record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT
FROM check_item_appeals WHERE item_id = #{itemId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE check_item_appeals SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{id}
UPDATE check_item_appeals SET current_step = #{currentStep}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{appealId}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM check_item_appeals WHERE deleted = 0
AND class_id = #{scopeId}
AND grade_id = #{scopeId}
AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 6 MONTH)
ORDER BY created_at DESC
